title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
